name: Constant Contact
description: Sync Constant Contact contacts, email campaigns, and contact lists into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Your Constant Contact OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.help: Found in your Constant Contact Developer portal under the application settings.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Your Constant Contact OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.help: Found in your Constant Contact Developer portal under the application settings.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Must match the redirect URI registered in your Constant Contact application.

methods.name: Install / Configure
methods.description: Validate client_id and client_secret are present.

methods.name: Authorize
methods.description: Return Constant Contact OAuth2 authorization URL.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /v3/account/summary and return HEALTHY/DEGRADED/OFFLINE with organization name.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of contacts and email campaigns with cursor-based pagination.

methods.name: List Contacts
methods.description: Cursor-paginated list of Constant Contact contacts.

methods.name: Get Contact
methods.description: Retrieve a single contact by ID.
